summary: Comprehensive testing of Mill Entry System completed. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend UI and most features working well. Critical business logic gap identified in BAG→G.Deposite cutting calculation.

business_logic_gaps.issue: Missing variable cutting rate logic: Should cut 0.50kg/bag when G.Deposite manually filled, 1kg/bag when auto-filled
business_logic_gaps.current_behavior: Only implements BAG → G.Deposite auto-fill, no variable cutting rates
business_logic_gaps.expected_behavior: BAG=500, G.Deposite=500 (manual) → 250kg cut vs BAG=500, G.Deposite=empty → 500kg cut

passed_tests: All auto-calculations working (QNTL, Mill W, P.Pkt Cut, Cutting, Final W)
action_item_for_main_agent: Implement variable BAG cutting logic: When G.Deposite is manually filled (equals BAG value), cut at 0.50kg per bag rate. When G.Deposite is empty/auto-filled, cut at 1kg per bag rate. This affects Final W calculation and totals.
